policy_status: Frozen before any baseline or proposed-model training

development_policy.allowed_use: Architecture debugging, loss verification, and validation-based hyperparameter screening only.

final_neural_evaluation_policy.applies_to: Every learned model included in the final headline comparison table, including the proposed model and learned baselines.
final_neural_evaluation_policy.point_estimate: Arithmetic mean of seed-level globally aggregated metrics.

hierarchical_ci_policy.method: Non-circular moving-block bootstrap over forecast-origin calendar days with neural seed resampling.

paired_comparison_policy.temporal_blocks: Identical resampled chronological blocks for both models.
paired_comparison_policy.seed_pairing: Matched seed indices when seed counts match; a deterministic baseline is repeated across learned-model seed slots.
paired_comparison_policy.interpretation_for_error_metrics: A paired 95% CI entirely below zero supports lower error for Model A under the frozen protocol.

ci_sensitivity_policy.note: The headline table uses the predeclared 3-day block length. Later supplementary analysis will verify that major conclusions are unchanged under 2-day and 4-day blocks.
